utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear with detailed specifications and associated costs. Each section includes all necessary details: health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with costs; and total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all required items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final plan includes four key coverage categories: physical health (€650/month international premium coverage), mental health (€120/month comprehensive stress management), property (home contents €90/month high-value coverage), and travel (€80/month global travel with emergency coordination). Based on the descriptions, these correspond to the highest-tier, premium-level options in the ground-truth ratings. The physical health plan explicitly includes international coverage, specialist access, and full cardiac emergency coverage, matching either 'EliteCare Premium Plan' or 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' (both rated 10). The mental health component matches 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (rating 10) due to the €120/month cost and comprehensive executive mental health coverage. The property coverage (€90/month, high-value home contents) matches 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel coverage (€80/month global travel insurance with medical evacuation) aligns with 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10), as it offers global protection and executive-level benefits. The additional concierge and advisory service corresponds to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10), which includes 24/7 concierge support and priority claims handling.
